chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-6210 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of case 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 22.09.2025 Mr. Syed Sultan Ahmed, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Naseer Ahmed and Ms. Rahmat-un-Nisa, Advocates for KDA. Mr. K.A Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The Comments submitted in the matter on behalf of the Respondent Nos.2 to 5 reflect that out of the sum of Rs.3.2 Million that was due and payable to the Petitioner on account of his Contributory Pension Fund, an amount of Rs.300,000/- has been paid. Under the circumstances, the aforementioned respondents are directed to settle the remaining dues of the Petitioner in full within a period of thirty days from today. The petition stands disposed of in the foregoing terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
